runs.note: Updated the session.js file to fix the session cookie configuration. Added the Secure, HttpOnly, and SameSite=Lax attributes to the session cookie, and changed the cookie name to __Host-sid to use the __Host- prefix as recommended in the HTTPS_MIGRATION.md document. This ensures the session cookies are secured against various attacks like cookie theft, XSS, and CSRF.
